parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workflow_runs_audit (
  run_id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  workflow_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  workflow_name TEXT,
  status TEXT,
  started_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  correlation_id TEXT,
  error_details JSONB,
  metrics JSONB
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pmo_meetings (
  meeting_id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  idempotency_key TEXT UNIQUE,
  correlation_id TEXT,
  source TEXT,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  objective TEXT,
  context_summary TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'proposed',
  priority TEXT,
  scheduled_for TIMESTAMPTZ,
  duration_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  requested_by TEXT,
  calendar_provider TEXT,
  calendar_event_id TEXT,
  calendar_url TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS idempotency_key TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS correlation_id TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS objective TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS context_summary TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS requested_for TIMESTAMPTZ;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS duration_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 30;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS timezone TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'America/Guayaquil';
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scheduling_status TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scheduling_notes TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS calendar_provider TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS calendar_event_id TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS calendar_url TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW();
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pmo_meeting_logs (
  log_id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  meeting_id UUID REFERENCES pmo_meetings(meeting_id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  correlation_id TEXT,
  action TEXT NOT NULL,
  actor TEXT,
  details JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events_outbox (
  outbox_id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  event_id TEXT,
  target TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'discord',
  action TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'notify',
  idempotency_key TEXT,
  payload JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  retry_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  scheduled_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  last_error TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events_inbox (
  event_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  source TEXT,
  event_type TEXT,
  external_id TEXT,
  occurred_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  received_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  correlation_id TEXT,
  actor TEXT,
  entity_type TEXT,
  entity_id TEXT,
  repo TEXT,
  trello_card_id TEXT,
  pull_request_number INTEGER,
  commit_sha TEXT,
  payload JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  normalized JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  processing_status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',
  retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  last_error TEXT
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pmo_raid_items (raid_id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), correlation_id TEXT, item_type TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, severity TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium', probability NUMERIC(4,3), impact TEXT, owner TEXT, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open', mitigation TEXT, due_date TIMESTAMPTZ, source TEXT, evidence JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW());
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pmo_action_items (action_id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), correlation_id TEXT, source TEXT, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, owner TEXT, priority TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium', status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open', due_date TIMESTAMPTZ, evidence JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), closed_at TIMESTAMPTZ);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pmo_health_snapshots (snapshot_id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, correlation_id TEXT, health_score INTEGER NOT NULL, health_status TEXT NOT NULL, summary TEXT, metrics JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, recommendations JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW());
SELECT
  json_build_object(
    'audit_total_24h', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_runs_audit WHERE started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),
    'audit_errors_24h', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_runs_audit WHERE status = 'error' AND started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),
    'outbox_dead', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events_outbox WHERE status = 'dead'),
    'outbox_pending', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events_outbox WHERE status IN ('pending','sending')),
    'inbox_failed', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events_inbox WHERE processing_status IN ('error','failed')),
    'meetings_open', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pmo_meetings WHERE status IN ('proposed','scheduled'))
  ) AS stats,
  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (SELECT run_id, workflow_id, workflow_name, status, started_at, completed_at, correlation_id, error_details, metrics FROM workflow_runs_audit ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 80) t), '[]'::json) AS audit_logs,
  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (SELECT log_id, meeting_id, correlation_id, action, actor, details, created_at FROM pmo_meeting_logs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 80) t), '[]'::json) AS meeting_logs,
  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (SELECT meeting_id, title, status, priority, scheduled_for, requested_by, calendar_url, created_at FROM pmo_meetings ORDER BY COALESCE(scheduled_for, created_at) DESC LIMIT 30) t), '[]'::json) AS meetings,
  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (SELECT outbox_id, target, action, status, retry_count, scheduled_at, sent_at, last_error, idempotency_key FROM events_outbox WHERE status IN ('dead','failed','pending','sending') ORDER BY scheduled_at DESC LIMIT 50) t), '[]'::json) AS outbox_logs,
  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (SELECT event_id, source, event_type, processing_status, retry_count, last_error, received_at, correlation_id FROM events_inbox WHERE processing_status IN ('error','failed','pending','processing','ingested') ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 50) t), '[]'::json) AS inbox_logs,
  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (SELECT snapshot_id, health_score, health_status, summary, recommendations, created_at FROM pmo_health_snapshots ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 12) t), '[]'::json) AS health_snapshots,
  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (SELECT raid_id, item_type, title, severity, owner, status, due_date, created_at FROM pmo_raid_items WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY CASE severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, due_date ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 30) t), '[]'::json) AS raid_items,
  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (SELECT action_id, title, owner, priority, status, due_date, created_at FROM pmo_action_items WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY due_date ASC NULLS LAST, CASE priority WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END LIMIT 30) t), '[]'::json) AS action_items;
